reviews.comment:
Aceptable en general. Buena atención, variedad, limpieza de baños hasta ahí, buena variedad de productos.

(Translated by Google)
Overall acceptable. Good service, variety, bathroom cleanliness was okay, good selection of products.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXMkt2c3BRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lo único a tener en cuenta es que no siempre tiene combustible en temporada de verano. Pero su reposición es en el dia

(Translated by Google)
The only thing to keep in mind is that it doesn't always have fuel during the summer season. But it's refilled the same day.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXa0tYcmRREAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención pero una hora de cola para cargar nafta se hace pesado cuando estás viajando.(No era culpa de ellos)

(Translated by Google)
Good service, but an hour's wait in line for gas is a drag when you're traveling. (It wasn't their fault.)
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXNE5TSWtBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Linda estación de servicio. Duchas gratis. Espacio para armar carpa. Dormimos tranquilos en nuestra casita con ruedas

(Translated by Google)
Nice gas station. Free showers. Space to pitch a tent. We slept soundly in our camper van.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXb0s3dW5BRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
It has the basics to be a drive-through gas station. It serves its purpose.
